EDA

{% raw %}

plot_spectra[source]

plot_spectra(X:np.ndarray, X_names:np.ndarray, figsize=(18, 5), sample=20)

Plot Mid-infrared spectra

Type Default Details
X np.ndarray Spectra (n_samples, n_wavenumbers)
X_names np.ndarray Wavenumbers (n_wavenumbers)
figsize tuple (18, 5) Wavenumbers
sample int 20 Size of random subset
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

get_y_by_order[source]

get_y_by_order(y, tax_order, tax_lookup)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

summary_plot[source]

summary_plot(y:np.ndarray, depth_order:np.ndarray, tax_lookup:dict)

Type Default Details
y np.ndarray Target variable (n_samples)
depth_order np.ndarray Soil and Depth (n_samples, 2)
tax_lookup dict {'alfisols': 0,'mollisols': 1, ...}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %}

To see an example of use, see Paper with code / 1. Exploratory Data Analysis
